message:
Fix merge() function dropping nested fields

Replace shallow AST-level spread operator approach with data-level
recursive merge implementation using the existing tenzir::merge()
function. This enables proper deep merging of nested records instead
of only merging top-level fields.

Resolves: TNZ-227

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+from {
+  a: {hostname: "server1", domain: "acme.com", hw: {sn: "XYZ123"}},
+  b: {hw: {model: "foobar"}},
+}
+x = merge(a, b)
+this = x

@@ -0,0 +1,12 @@
+from {
+  a: {x: {y: {z: 1, w: 2}}},
+  b: {x: {y: {z: 99, v: 3}}},
+  c: {key: "string_value"},
+  d: {key: {nested: 1}},
+  e: {foo: 1},
+  f: {bar: 2},
+}
+deep = merge(a, b)
+conflict = merge(c, d)
+disjoint = merge(e, f)
+this = {deep: deep, conflict: conflict, disjoint: disjoint}
